creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi vvelox,
Your tree is outdated.

Look at the current version of pkg-plist:
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/textproc/en-aspell/pkg-plist?revision=340714&view=markup

Wed Jan 22 15:16:56 2014 UTC (7 months ago) by mat 



It already has %%VER%%, not %%VERSON%% so I suspect your base port is very old, at least more than 7 months old.
